title: Fix theme colours (remove all black), fix SparkParticles distribution, restore warm/bright palette

requirements.text: Completely remove all black and near-black colours from the entire app UI. No background, card, button, badge, text, border, overlay, modal, header, footer, or any other element should use black (#000000), near-black (#111, #1a1a1a, #0a0a0a, or equivalent dark OKLCH values close to 0% lightness). Audit frontend/src/index.css, frontend/index.css, and tailwind.config.js for any dark-mode or base rules that produce black surfaces or black text and replace them with appropriate light alternatives from the chosen warm palette.

quotes: do not make the website in black colour at all
change the theme to previous or much more clear one than a black one

acceptanceCriteria: No element in the app renders with a black or near-black (#000–#222 range) background or text colour.
Dark-mode CSS rules that produce black surfaces are removed or overridden.
The app remains fully readable with sufficient contrast on all surfaces.

requirements.text: Redesign the global colour palette to a warm, bright, friendly theme using one of the following combos (or a harmonious combination): warm brown/skin-tone (e.g. sandy #F5CBA7, warm beige #FAE5D3, terracotta #E8956D accents) paired with off-white backgrounds, OR a blue/white palette (sky blue #60A5FA family, white #FFFFFF, soft blue-grey #EFF6FF). Choose the palette that gives the most clarity and cheerfulness, remove the current dark/lavender-heavy or any near-black OKLCH tokens, and apply the new palette consistently across: header, footer, navigation pills, active-route indicator, cards, buttons (primary, secondary), badges, banners, modals (YearSelectionModal), the dot-grid background dots, and the SparkParticles pills. Update tailwind.config.js design tokens and frontend/src/index.css CSS custom properties to reflect the new palette. Ensure every page (Home, Share, PostDetail, Dashboard, About, Wishlist) uses the updated tokens.

quotes: keep the previous or combos like brown-skin tone or blue white or etc
change the theme to previous or much more clear one than a black one

acceptanceCriteria: The app uses a warm brown/skin-tone or blue/white colour scheme with no black or dark surfaces.
All Tailwind config colour tokens and CSS custom properties reflect the new palette.
Cards, buttons, badges, modals, header, and footer all use the new palette consistently.
Text on all surfaces has sufficient contrast ratio (≥ 4.5:1) for readability.

requirements.text: Fix the SparkParticles component (frontend/src/components/SparkParticles.tsx) so that the 12–20 floating year-label pills ('I'm 1st Year', 'I'm 2nd Year', 'I'm 3rd Year', 'I'm 4th Year') are distributed evenly across the entire viewport — both horizontally (0%–95% of viewport width) and vertically (starting positions spread across 0%–90% of viewport height). The current seeded-random positioning is producing clustering in certain areas; replace the position calculation so particles are spread across a well-distributed grid-like or stratified random layout covering the full screen. Each of the 16 instances should start at a distinct, well-separated position. Also ensure the particles' colours are updated to match the new warm palette (REQ-51) so they do not appear dark or purple.

quotes: the pop ups of im 1st year,2nd year ,3rd year and 4th year are poppping only at certain places so rectify

acceptanceCriteria: Spark pills appear across the full viewport width and height, not clustered in one corner or region.
All four year-label phrases are evenly represented across the 16 instances.
Spark pill colours match the new warm palette (no dark or purple tones).
Particles remain pointer-events: none and do not block interactive elements.

constraints: Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Do not introduce any black, near-black (#000–#222), or very dark OKLCH colours anywhere in the UI.
All changes are frontend-only; no backend modifications are required.
nonGoals: Changing any backend logic or data models.
Adding new pages or features beyond colour/theme and SparkParticles fixes.
Modifying font families (Bricolage Grotesque / DM Sans / Dancing Script) unless they are the source of dark colour issues.
